label: Sound param source: Perlin noise
description: Generates a smoothly varying Perlin noise value as the parameter.

timeType.label: Time type
timeType.description: Whether the Perlin noise uses game ticks or real-time seconds as its input.

perlinFrequency.label: Perlin frequency
perlinFrequency.description: Frequency of the Perlin noise function (cycles per time unit).

syncType.label: Sync type
syncType.description: Whether multiple instances share the same noise phase (Sync) or run independently (Desync).
